_meta.name: NREL-118 per-fuel input prices
_meta.description: Fuel prices as embedded in the NREL-Sienna/PowerSystemsTestData 118-Bus Julia loader (the official Sienna ingestion script). Not present as a paper-table per se, but they ARE the canonical price assumption the PCM/PLEXOS model uses when reproducing the paper. The gtopt converter currently sets Fuel.price=0 (gcost is the only dispatch signal), so these are noted here as a future-faithfulness hook.
_meta.units: USD per MMBTU (Sienna convention for ThermalStandard fuel_cost on a FuelCurve)
